name: html
description: Extract text and links from HTML (native Rust tag-soup parser)
author: system

hints.overview: Parse HTML to extract text and links. Handles malformed HTML gracefully.
criticalRules: parseHtml(html) returns {text, links} — most efficient for both
htmlToText(html) if you only need text, extractLinks(html) if you only need links
antiPatterns: Don't parse HTML with regex — use parseHtml() instead
commonPatterns: Fetch + parse: const html = fetchText(url); const {text, links} = parseHtml(html)
